data.param: {"input":"{\"aspect_ratio\":\"3:4\",\"prompt\":\"Dramatic, realistic editorial photograph, full color (NOT grayscale/duotone — this shot is a deliberate brand exception), ink-black (#101010) background, vertical portrait orientation.\\n\\nExtremely tight, close-cropped shot: the back of a man's head and neck, hair buzzed very short (a few millimeters, skin-fade style — NOT fully bald, a light stubble of hair is visible so the paint sits on short hair, not bare skin). A barber's hand, out of focus at the very edge of frame, holds a small fine-tip artist's brush and is in the middle of hand-painting the Argentina national flag onto the back/crown of the head: three horizontal bands (light sky-blue, white, light sky-blue) with a small golden sun emblem centered in the white band, rendered as wet, glossy body-paint pigment that catches the light — realistic skin-safe paint texture, visible brush strokes, a little pigment sheen. Everything outside the painted flag area (skin, remaining short hair, barber's sleeve) stays in the same high-contrast look as the rest of the frame.\\n\\nLighting: single dramatic warm gold key light from the side, raking across the skin and catching the wet paint sheen, deep shadows falling to pure black. Shallow depth of field — the painted flag and brush tip are the sharp focal point, the barber's hand and background falling softly out of focus. Moody, cinematic, high-end studio editorial photography, sharp texture detail on the paint and skin.\\n\\nComposition: leave the upper third and right third of the frame as clean, uncluttered dark negative space (softly out-of-focus barbershop interior, ink-black tones) for later text overlay — do not place the subject dead-center, keep him lower-left of frame.\\n\\nAbsolutely no text, no letters, no numbers, no logo, no watermark, no graphic overlays, no UI elements, no flags other than the one being painted, no FIFA or federation emblems, no trophy — pure photography only, a clean background plate.\",\"resolution\":\"2K\"}","model":"gpt-image-2-text-to-image"}
